CE1.justification: Acted on step 1 then asked for one structured set of inputs (timestamps under each of the four headers, or pointers to source data) — single targeted ask rather than multiple separate questions.

CE2.justification: Quotes the runbook ('runbook says...'), restates the stall rationale, lists per-header questions, and then narrates the remaining step sequence with paths — several stretches of process narration past what was needed.

CE3.justification: Names the current artifact location and the eventual final path ('projects/postmortems/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback.md') with each runbook step as the why, in-line.

CE4.justification: Single timeline.md shell written; the stall is clean and an interruption leaves one coherent placeholder with no orphans.
